diagram_title: Markdown And Chat Rich Content Rendering - C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Webapp
systems.description: Browser-based session and file management interface.

systems.name: Workspace File API
systems.description: Backend file read/list service surfaced through the SDK.

containers.name: Session UI Container
containers.description: Session page components and rich content providers.

containers.name: File Workspace Container
containers.description: File state, tab state, and file viewer integration.

components.name: Markdown File Tab Renderer
components.description: Renders markdown files inside the existing file tab surface.

components.name: Session Rich Content Provider
components.description: Provides markdown, diff, and code rendering dependencies that can be shared by chat and markdown file views.

components.name: Message Content Renderer
components.description: Renders assistant text parts through markdown and future interactive rich-content hooks.

components.name: File Context Store
components.description: Normalizes paths, loads files, and stores selected-line state.

components.name: File Tab Viewer
components.description: Displays opened files and existing SVG preview behavior.

relationships.description: Uses shared markdown and rich content providers to render markdown file content.
Uses the shared rich content provider to render interactive assistant output.
Triggers file open and selected-line updates from file-reference interactions.
Supplies file content and line-selection state to the active file tabs.
Reads and refreshes workspace file content through the SDK-backed file API.
